final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input power_good,
    output reg invalid_output
);always @(*) begin
    if (A && B && power_good) begin
        invalid_output <= 1'b1; // Set invalid_output to high
    end else begin
        invalid_output <= 1'b0; // Set invalid_output to low
    end
end

endmodule
